customer stories

Trusted Conversations Begin with Answering the Right Questions
Who
See All Features
Who’s financially connected to the client and why does that matter? Relationship Maps show the people behind the plan, helping advisors center conversations on what, and who, really matters.
Why
See All Features
Why are we doing any of this? Priorities give clients a voice in the planning process, so every conversation connects strategy to what matters most in their lives.
What/Where
See All Features
The Asset-Map gives clients and advisors a shared, one-page view of their financial life: what they have, where they stand, and what’s at stake. Conversations start with clarity, and decisions are made with confidence.
If
See All Features
What if something goes wrong? Signals help advisors uncover risks, gaps, and oversights so they can have proactive conversations before surprises become setbacks.
When
See All Features
When does action need to happen? Target-Maps make timelines and funding gaps visible, turning vague goals into clear, trackable conversations about timing and readiness.
How
See All Features
How do we get there? Drafts let advisors visually present “before and after” scenarios so clients can clearly see the impact of changes before committing. It’s a safe, visual space to explore options and move forward with confidence.
A Full Suite of Integration Partners
Deliver a seamless client experience by connecting Asset-Map with your favorite advisor tech tools. Our open architecture lets you integrate reports and sync data effortlessly with trusted partners.
See All Integrations
Security & Compliance Built In
Asset-Map is SOC 2 Type II certified and independently audited to meet the highest security standards for financial advisors. Bank-level encryption protects client data at every step, and our platform is FINRA and SEC compliant to ensure confidential financial information remains secure.
Awards & Recognition
Honored and recognized by our industry, peers, and users.
